3225280.name: Mr. Bunny
3225280.description:
Step into the Veil as Mr. Bunny, a fearless warrior navigating the realm between life and death. Hack and slash through dynamic environments, master the powers of sunlight and moonlight to defeat monstrous foes, and reclaim your destiny in this rogue-like adventure!

WHAT DOESN'T KILL YOU MAKES YOU STRONGER!

  • The fewer hearts you have, the more powerful your attacks become.

  • Balance your health for maximum damage!

STRATEGIC USE OF LIGHT

  • Open windows to let in sunlight or moonlight at crucial moments.

  • Daytime favors you, providing sunlight to burn enemies.

  • Nighttime is more challenging, as moonlight benefits enemies, restoring enemy health, granting semi-invisibility, transforming enemies into powerful werewolves, or providing temporary invulnerability.

BUT WATCH OUT WHAT YOU ARE BECOMING!

  • Each enemy hit makes you stronger, but also starts turning you into one of them, making you vulnerable to sunlight! 

Help Mr. Bunny conquer the Veil, collect the keystones, and unlock the gates of destiny!!!

Wishlist now to support the game!
3225280.supported_languages: 英语, 法语, 意大利语, 德语, 西班牙语 - 西班牙, 日语, 韩语, 俄语, 简体中文
